details: Disposal instruction for inward remittance of USD 250,000 received from Acme Corp USA on 05 May 2026. SWIFT Ref: BKIDINGB20260505001. Requested disposal: Credit to INR Primary Account at spot rate.
SWIFT MT103 confirmation requested for outward remittance TXN-2026-012 dated 03 May 2026. Beneficiary: Shanghai Trading Co. Amount: USD 75,000.
Certified bank statement for INR Primary Account (BOIGC001) for the period 01 Apr 2026 to 30 Apr 2026 for audit purposes.
Stop payment request for scheduled transfer to Tokyo Partners Ltd — SCH-TOKYO-001. Reason: Commercial dispute. Amount: INR 32,00,000.
